positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a glowing nebula spiralizing around a single, silhouetted geometric mountain range. The palette is deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and ethereal gold accents, suggesting a cosmic vaporwave feel. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing clean negative space for high contrast, making it ideal for repeating patterns or single-placement apparel prints. Emphasize clean lines, smooth gradients, and a symmetrical, badge-like aesthetic. Hyperdetailed, vector illustration quality, digital ink wash style, volumetric lighting, highly graphic, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, low resolution, artifact, noise, jpeg artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs
